text.title: Abuse Case Test Cookbook Worked Example
text.summary: Worked example showing the methodology applied end-to-end, with a trace through the rules and the final spec artefact.

section.title: Trace
section.p: Team builds the cookbook for IDOR/SSRF/CSRF/JWT-misuse on a SaaS app. Each step owns one OWASP category with named exit_criterion.

section.title: Final artefact

list.item: r1 satisfied: every step has exit_criterion.
r2 satisfied: branch has explicit signal.
r3 satisfied: deviation log path set.
r4 satisfied: playbook has named owner.
